title: Fried Egg Mod
description: Adds a new use for the Minecraft egg: fryability!
body:
[![Requires Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) This mod adds one simple thing: the **Fried Egg**. You can simply cook any **Egg** (normal, Blue or Brown) in a **Furnace**, **Smoker** or **Campfire** and out comes a Fried Egg. This extends the usage of eggs in the vanilla game. ## Smelting Recipe

The Fried Egg texture from [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) by [vectorwing](https://modrinth.com/user/vectorwing) was used in this mod, which is why this mod has the same license. [![Farmer's Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a216d35e5abbc1bb74409b2d29b42075eb3c891.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
